description: Product Description DR J INSECT REPELLENT GEL Ingredients Aqua/water,alcohol denat,menthanediol(eucalyptus maculata citriodora),cyclopentasiloxane,dipropylene glycol,acrylates/C10-30 alkyl acrylate crosspolymer,polysorbate-20,carbomer,parfum,cymbopogon winterianus herb(citronella)oil,cymbopopon flexuosus(lemongrass)oil,eucalyptus globulus leaf(eucalyptus)oil,lavandula angustifolia(lavender)oil,phenoxyethanol,disodium EDTA,methylparaben,ethylparaben,butylparaben,propylparaben,sodium hydroxide,limonene,geraniol,linalool,citral,citronellol.
